style: hand-coloured cartographic plate, muted ink, period-appropriate

images.prompt: Mud-brick Aššur citadel above the Tigris, donkey caravan leaving the gate; hand-coloured plate.
Walled tell of Apum on the steppe, caravanserai with donkeys at troughs; hand-coloured plate.
Euphrates crossing at Hahhum, reed-bundle rafts ferrying donkeys, customs post with tablets; hand-coloured plate.
Mountain town of Mamma in Anti-Taurus valley, donkeys under pine, snowy peaks; hand-coloured plate.
Kaneš kārum lower town with scribes and donkeys being unloaded; hand-coloured plate.
